scripts.db:migrate: sh -ac 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env.local ] && . ../../.env.local; [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; set +a; prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma "$@"' --
scripts.db:seed: npm run db:generate && sh -ac 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env.local ] && . ../../.env.local; [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; set +a; node prisma/seed.mjs'
